## [00:00 - 01:30]

This is the pubcast shot. I'm John Loomer and today we're gonna talk about the impact of publishing to YouTube shorts every day Let's go Here's what happened once I published to YouTube shorts every day I've had a YouTube channel since 2012 I've been very inconsistent with it and while I hit 15,000 subscribers recently Much of that happened during the first few years. I started creating short form videos last year and beginning in November I started sharing to YouTube shorts These are the exact same videos that I shared to TikTok and Reels and really I was mostly Underwhelmed by the results early on and I still don't get the traction there that I do elsewhere But I'm realizing the impact of publishing a video every day there now in the 60 days prior to starting with YouTube shorts I had under 3000 views and just over 100 subscribers in the most recent 60 days now that I'm publishing a short every day views have increased 10x and Subs 4x and really all with very little effort other than just publishing a video that I already published elsewhere So overall not bad and it also seems like my results are getting better. What are you seeing on YouTube shorts? So this shot was taken directly from a video I did on TikTok If you're not already following me on TikTok do so at John Loomer can also keep following me here Don't forget to subscribe rate and review until next time do awesome things
